title: [CI:BUILD] postbuild step: skip under nightly treadmill
body:
Principally because 'make completion' fails if we transitively
bring in a new cobra, but also, none of the other tests are
meaningful under the treadmill.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Logs confirming that postbuild still runs in regular CI: [f37](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5157308531998720?logs=postbuild#L0), [f36](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4875833555288064?logs=postbuild#L0), [Debian](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6001733462130688?logs=postbuild#L0), [f37 aarch64](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5438783508709376?logs=postbuild#L0)
